channel.title: GitHub Bicep Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Bicep in GitHub

item.title: Azure-Samples/get-started-with-ai-chat
item.description: Basic sample for deploying chat web apps with Azure AI Foundry and SDKs

item.title: Azure/bicep
item.description: Bicep is a declarative language for describing and deploying Azure resources

item.title: Azure-Samples/msdocs-nodejs-mongodb-azure-sample-app
item.description: A sample Express.js app using a MongoDB database to show how to host Node.js app in Azure App service using Azure Cosmos DB
